strengths: 15+ years full-stack engineering with current AI-agent infrastructure work—directly matches seniority and emerging-tech requirements.
Expert-level TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, AWS; proven ability to deliver at scale across complex systems.
Strong engineering culture: TDD/CI-CD advocacy, open-source contributions, mentoring, and knowledge-sharing through workshops.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, Jest, or Playwright—required testing and framework skills.
Resume name mismatch: 'Aisha Okonkwo' vs. all contact info referencing 'Bogdan Szabo'—authenticity concern.
Missing explicit Kotlin, cloud platform names, Kubernetes, and auth/security best practices coverage.

key_factors.factor: Full-stack seniority and AI-agent infrastructure expertise
Gaps in Nest.js and specified testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest/Playwright)
Name discrepancy and professional documentation concerns

response.justification: The candidate brings 15+ years of senior full-stack engineering with current AI-agent infrastructure experience, matching key requirements. However, explicit gaps exist in Nest.js, Vitest/Jest/Playwright, Kotlin, and named cloud platforms—all stated core skills. The resume name-company mismatch raises authentication and attention-to-detail concerns. While fundamental engineering strength is exceptional and missing frameworks are typically learnable, verification of specific tool expertise and professional documentation accuracy is essential before advancement.
